texto: I am neither sad nor cheerful
autor: the air here fills one with a kind of vague excitement and induces a state as far removed from cheerfulness as it is from sorrow
explicacao: Citação de the air here fills one with a kind of vague excitement and induces a state as far removed from cheerfulness as it is from sorrow sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I am neither sad nor cheerful” articula reflexao, perhaps-it-is-happiness, neither em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
